mapper.select: /** UsptTaskRspnberDao.selectOne */ select task_rspnber_id ,bsns_plan_doc_id ,rspnber_nm ,enc_brthdy ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_email ,dept_nm ,clsf_nm ,adres ,enc_telno ,enc_fxnum ,tlsy_regist_no ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from uspt_task_rspnber where 1=1 and bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId}
